hooks.command:
bash -c '
if [ -z "$CMUX_WORKSPACE_ID" ]; then
  echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠️ cmux not detected (CMUX_WORKSPACE_ID not set). Startup splits skipped.\"}"
  exit 0
fi

# Skip if other surfaces already exist (tools already running)
OTHER_SURFACES=$(cmux list-pane-surfaces 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$CMUX_SURFACE_ID$" | wc -l | tr -d " ")
if [ "$OTHER_SURFACES" -gt 0 ]; then
  pgrep -x ollama >/dev/null || ollama serve &>/tmp/ollama.log &
  exit 0
fi

# Right column stack: lazygit / btop / ollama
SURFACE=$(cmux new-split right | awk "{print \$2}")
cmux send --surface "$SURFACE" "lazygit"
cmux send-key --surface "$SURFACE" Enter

SURFACE2=$(cmux new-split down --surface "$SURFACE" | awk "{print \$2}")
cmux send --surface "$SURFACE2" "btop"
cmux send-key --surface "$SURFACE2" Enter

SURFACE3=$(cmux new-split down --surface "$SURFACE2" | awk "{print \$2}")
cmux send --surface "$SURFACE3" "watch -n2 ollama ps"
cmux send-key --surface "$SURFACE3" Enter

pgrep -x ollama >/dev/null || ollama serve &>/tmp/ollama.log &
'
